title: Local rule evaluation with write-time enforcement
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 3.3, 7.2, 7.5, 7.6.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] Local rules evaluate on issue create AND update.
- [hard] Local rules ALSO run on the batch write path (bulk_update.rs / jit issue update --filter), which today uses a separate validate_update(); enforce rules are not bypassable via batch update.
- [hard] enforce rules block writes; --force bypasses; a --force bypass of an enforce rule is logged to events.jsonl.
- [hard] Graph-scope rules are skipped on write.
